zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Muschamp於大約1067年出生在英國德比夏爾易爾可斯頓時，他的父親Roger de Muschamp24歲，母親Beatrice Herrera28歲。他和Agnes至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1131年之前在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德武爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Muschamp于大约1067年出生在英国德比夏爾易爾可斯頓时，他的父亲Roger de Muschamp24岁，母亲Beatrice Herrera28岁。他和Agnes至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1131年之前在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德武爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Muschamp was born about 1067, in Ilkeston, Derbyshire, England, his father, Roger de Muschamp, was 24 and his mother, Beatrice Herrera, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes. He died before 1131, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Muschamp est né environ 1067, à Ilkeston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Muschamp, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Herrera, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes. Il est décédé avant 1131, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Muschamp um 1067 in Ilkeston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Muschamp 24 und seine Mutter Beatrice Herrera 28. Er hatte mit Agnes mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1131 in Wooler, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Muschamp è nato il circa 1067 nel Ilkeston, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Muschamp, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Herrera, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes. Morì prima del 1131, nel Wooler, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Muschampが約1067年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアイルケストンで生まれた時，父Roger de Muschampは24歳，母Beatrice Herreraは28歳であった。彼はAgnesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1131年以前にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Muschamp(이)가 대략 1067년 영국 더비실르 이케스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Muschamp(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Herrera(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Muschamp nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em Ilkeston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Muschamp, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Herrera, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes. Ele faleceu antes 1131, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Muschamp родился около 1067 г. в местности илкестон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Muschamp было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Herrera, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes. Он умер перед 1131 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Muschamp nació aproximadamente 1067, en Ilkeston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Muschamp, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Beatrice Herrera, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes. Murió antes de 1131, en Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
